official_functions.role: Construct the official Play clientbound show_dialog fixture
Encode/decode the direct Dialog holder marker and direct NoticeDialog body
Write and dispatch the full Play clientbound framed packet

invariants: The official Play clientbound protocol table registers show_dialog with the registry-friendly common show_dialog codec.
The direct NoticeDialog fixture preserves dialog type, title, empty body/input counts, and common flags.
This contract does not prove dialog UI display behavior, screen flow, registry-backed dialogs, custom actions, or runtime behavior.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this packet-support contract to infer dialog UI behavior or registry-backed dialog support.
